name: Vale

passive.name: Windtalk
passive.description: Vale gains 1 stack of (Windtalk) each time he gets a kill or an assist that increases his Movement Speed by 8. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

skill1.name: Wind Blade
skill1.description: Vale unleashes two wind blades toward the left and right of a target area, each dealing 250 (+80% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit.
skill1.tips: It's the main damage-dealing skill of Vale and it takes time to deal the high-burst damage. So it would be better to ensure the hit rate by releasing it in advance or using it when the enemies are under control. If your team provides enough control, then it would be better to choose to increase damage. Otherwise, it would be better to choose to increase area so that the skill hit rate will get improved. When choosing to enhance skills for the first time, if for higher damage, choose to enhance 1st kill first then.

skill2.name: Windblow
skill2.description: Vale sends a whirlwind in the target direction, dealing 350 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit and knocking them airborne for 0.8s (each enemy can only be knocked airborne 1 time). When the whirlwind reaches its destination, it will remain for 1.6s while continuously dealing a total of 150 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in range.
skill2.tips: The slowing down effect of this skill can increase the hit rate of his 1st skill. Normally it would be better to choose knock up effect. If your team provides enough control, then better choose stop-on-hit effect. For the first time if you don't choose to build damage of 1st kill, then you should choose the knock-up effect of this skill, for it provides stable control for the team. Normally, this skill will be build when it's the third time to enhance skills.

ultimate.name: Windstorm
ultimate.description:
Vale summons a windstorm at the target location, dealing a total of 150 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in the area and slowing them by 20% while continuously pulling them into its center. After 1s, the windstorem will explode, dealing 900 (+240% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage.
The remaining whirlwinds will also be pulled into the center.
ultimate.tips: Choosing to increase damage is always a good choice, but it needs choosing knock-up effect of 2nd skill, or it is hard to use ultimate to hit enemies. When choosing control effect, the damage of 1st skill should be ensured. Normally, choose to enhance Ultimate for the second time.

mechanicNote: Vale adalah mage dengan kemampuan burst/poke damage dari jarak aman.
